description: Local Falcon is a local SEO and AI visibility platform for tracking how businesses appear in Google Maps, Apple Maps, and AI search products such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, and Google AI Overviews. It provides geo-grid rank tracking, scan/report retrieval, campaign management, and related analysis for agencies and multi-location businesses.
summary: Local Falcon exposes a REST API with OpenAPI specs, a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.localfalcon.com/mcp, and a Node-distributed MCP CLI package (@local-falcon/mcp).
